evals.name: openclaw-baseline-rerun
evals.prompt: 用 /Users/bytedance/Downloads/Open Claw为什么爆火？ (1).mp4 跑一版 3:4 短视频封面对比，保持之前 OpenClaw 效果好的高冲击科技封面方向，输出三张封面和 review 页面。
evals.expected_output: Creates a timestamped workdir under ~/Desktop/video-covers, extracts frames, analyzes the video, uses the OpenClaw red mechanical claw / AI scheduling baseline, generates info-heavy, visual-heavy, and balanced covers with model-rendered title/subtitle, runs quality checks, and returns the review HTML path plus three cover paths.
assertions: Output includes a review.seedream.text.html file path.
Output includes three cover JPGs named info-heavy.jpg, visual-heavy.jpg, and balanced.jpg.
quality.seedream.text.json reports passed=true for all three covers.
Generated prompts use model-rendered 主标题/副标题 wording rather than local overlay.
OpenClaw prompts contain a concrete red mechanical claw or AI scheduling visual metaphor.

evals.name: claude-code-risk-hook
evals.prompt: 用 /Users/bytedance/Downloads/高强度用了两周 Claude Code，我有 3 个真实感受.mp4 跑一版封面，对比 OpenClaw baseline 的迁移效果。标题你来选，要抓住视频里最有点击感的钩子。
evals.expected_output: Analyzes the Claude Code video, chooses a strong risk/result/pain title rather than a bland summary, avoids inventing a presenter face, generates three Seedream covers with no-person symbolic AI/dev-tool visuals, and returns a review page.
files: /Users/bytedance/Downloads/高强度用了两周 Claude Code，我有 3 个真实感受.mp4
assertions: Chosen title is a click hook rather than a plain summary like Claude使用实测.
Prompts avoid generating a fake presenter or new face.
Prompts preserve the seedream.text model-rendered title/subtitle pattern.
Output includes review HTML, three cover JPGs, prompts JSON, analysis JSON, titles JSON, and quality JSON.
Quality check passes for all generated covers.

evals.name: missing-api-key-stop-cleanly
evals.prompt: 我给你一个本地视频让你生成封面，但当前环境没有 VCG_IMAGE_API_KEY。请按流程尽可能往前跑，不能本地叠字或用 Pillow 做最终封面。
evals.expected_output: Stops cleanly after analysis/prompt generation or earlier if necessary, explains that Seedream image API configuration is required, and does not create fake final covers with local rendering.
assertions: Does not use local/Pillow final cover rendering as a fallback.
Explains which API key or configuration is missing.
Preserves any completed intermediate artifacts and reports their paths.
Does not claim that final covers were generated when the image API was unavailable.

evals.name: identity-critical-human-gate
evals.prompt: 用 /Users/bytedance/Downloads/抖音2026518-001588.mp4 跑一版封面。这个视频大量是博主本人出镜，流程需要避免生成 AI 假人像，并让用户选择上传本人照片、用视频帧，或不使用真人。
evals.expected_output: After VLM analysis, writes person_asset_gate.json, detects that the video is identity-sensitive, pauses before prompt/image generation, asks the user to choose uploaded-photo or no-person as the production options, labels video-frame as experimental, and does not generate fictional presenter covers unless a person strategy is provided.
assertions: Output includes a person_asset_gate.json file with requires_decision=true.
The workflow stops before generating covers when no person_mode has been selected.
The user is offered uploaded-photo and no-person as production choices.
video-frame is labeled as experimental rather than a default product path.
Prompts are not generated with invented or generic presenter instructions while person_mode is auto.
If no-person is selected, prompts explicitly forbid people/faces and use topic symbols instead.

evals.name: cross-format-consistency-check
evals.prompt: OpenClaw 已经有选中的 3:4 封面和生成出的 4:3 横版封面。请检查横竖版标题、主体、风格和构图是否一致，输出一个可复用的 JSON 质检结果。
evals.expected_output: Runs the cross-format consistency checker on selected 3:4 and generated 4:3 covers, writes consistency.cross-format.json, and reports scores for title consistency, subtitle consistency, subject consistency, style consistency, landscape composition, and thumbnail legibility.
assertions: Output includes consistency.cross-format.json.
The report includes an overall_score and passed field.
The report includes title, subtitle, subject, style, landscape composition, and thumbnail legibility scores.
The report flags critical issues when the 4:3 image changes the main subject, title, or person identity.
The report gives a concrete recommendation for rerunning or accepting the 4:3 image.

evals.name: end-to-end-runner-openclaw
evals.prompt: 用新的 end-to-end workflow runner 对 /Users/bytedance/Downloads/Open Claw为什么爆火？ (1).mp4 做一次全自动验证，输出 3:4、4:3、review 页面、workflow 报告和横竖版一致性检查。
evals.expected_output: Runs scripts/run_cover_workflow.py with --auto, creates a timestamped workdir, generates three 3:4 covers, selects one, generates a 4:3 landscape cover, runs cross-format consistency, and writes workflow_state.json, workflow_report.json, workflow_report.md, review.seedream.text.html, and consistency.cross-format.json.
assertions: Output includes workflow_report.md and workflow_state.json.
workflow_state.json has status=completed.
Output includes three 3:4 cover JPGs and one 4:3 landscape JPG.
Output includes consistency.cross-format.json.
If consistency initially fails, the workflow retries the 4:3 generation once.

evals.name: food-documentary-japan-cuisine
evals.prompt: 用 /Users/bytedance/Desktop/案例/科普/从地狱开局，到高端化身，日料是如何崛起的？【食录】.mp4 跑一版封面。目标是「赛博食录风格」的电影海报式纪录片封面：纯黑暗调底 + 粉笔喷溅风格的多行竖向堆叠主标题 + 左上红色品牌印章「食录」+ 右上红色「完整版」角标 + 下半部分美食特写实拍主体（电影感打光的握寿司/手/料理刷）+ 底部 @赛博食录 账号水印。标题用「日料凭啥这么贵」，副标题「完整版」。
evals.expected_output: VLM 把视频识别为 info_expression / 饮食文化科普 / no-person-needed（key_elements 必须包含日料、米其林、餐厅等真实主体词）。build_cover_prompts.py 命中 is_food_documentary_source() 路由（不命中 AI 工具默认 fallback 也不命中学科教育路由）。生成的 prompts.json 必须包含「电影海报式美食纪录片」「粉笔喷溅」「食录」「完整版」「@赛博食录」「美食特写实拍」等关键 token；必须明确禁止 AI 节点 / 代码终端 / K 线 / cyberpunk 霓虹 / 3D 金属字+螺丝铆钉（防止学科教育垂类污染）。最终封面是 1080x1440 JPG，黑底高对比、粉笔字、红色印章 + 完整版、美食实拍主体齐全。reference 输出参考 evals/reference_outputs/food_documentary_japan.jpg。
files: /Users/bytedance/Desktop/案例/科普/从地狱开局，到高端化身，日料是如何崛起的？【食录】.mp4
assertions: prompts.seedream.text.json 必须包含「电影海报式美食纪录片」字段（命中 is_food_documentary_source 路由）。
prompts 必须包含「粉笔喷溅」「印章」「食录」「@赛博食录」「完整版」中至少 4 个。
prompts 主标题 prompt 必须要求多行竖向堆叠（包含「多行竖向堆叠」「竖向堆叠」「垂直堆叠」中的关键字）。
prompts 必须明确禁止 AI 工具污染：「代码终端」「AI 节点」「K 线」「cyberpunk」「青色科技」中至少 3 个出现在禁止段。
prompts 必须明确禁止学科教育污染：「3D 金属」「螺丝铆钉」「工业线框」中至少 2 个出现在禁止段（避免跨垂类视觉残留）。
title_strategy 应该用反差/质疑/起源类 hook（如「凭啥这么贵」「崛起史」「秘密」），不应该是 risk/reversal/result/pain（AI 工具 hook）。
person_asset_gate 判定 no-person-needed（饮食纪录片以食物为主体，不需真人）。
三张封面尺寸 1080x1440，黑底高对比；至少一张里出现真实美食实拍特写（握寿司 / 手 / 料理工具），且没有 AI 节点 / K 线 / 代码窗口元素。
封面文字包含「日料」「凭啥」「这么贵」「食录」「完整版」（VLM/OCR 抽样验证）。
封面字体气质必须是粉笔喷溅/撕裂残破/旧报纸感，不能是 3D 立体金属厚切字（这是学科教育的字体气质）。

evals.name: academic-engineering-minimalist-poster
evals.prompt: 用 /Users/bytedance/Desktop/案例/科技/这样的《结构力学》你喜欢吗？桁架内力篇.mp4 跑一版封面。目标是奥达升 AWE 风格的极简主义工程科普海报：深蓝纯色底 + 白色立体厚切主标题（带螺丝铆钉细节）+ 4 层文字结构（kicker 这样的 + mega title 结构力学 + 白色斜放疑问标签 你喜欢吗？+ 橙色矩形系列标签 桁架内力篇）+ 下半部分扁平 2D 工业线框桁架（3 个垂直堆叠 + 红蓝节制箭头 + 虚线锚定三角支座）。标题用「结构力学」，副标题「桁架内力篇」。
evals.expected_output: VLM 把视频识别为 info_expression / no-person-needed 学科教育类（key_elements 必须包含桁架结构 / 弦杆内力等真实主体）。build_cover_prompts.py 命中 is_academic_engineering_source() 路由（不是默认 high-impact tech cover）。生成的 prompts.json 必须包含「极简主义工程科普海报」「扁平 2D 工业线框」「螺丝铆钉」「锚定三角支座」「4 层文字结构」「kicker 这样的」「你喜欢吗？」「橙色矩形」「红蓝指示箭头」等关键 token；必须明确禁止 AI 节点 / 代码终端 / K 线 / cyberpunk 霓虹。最终封面是 1080x1440 JPG，主标题清晰可读，4 段文字位置正确。reference 输出参考 evals/reference_outputs/academic_engineering_b4_raw.jpg。
files: /Users/bytedance/Desktop/案例/科技/这样的《结构力学》你喜欢吗？桁架内力篇.mp4
assertions: prompts.seedream.text.json 必须包含「极简主义工程科普海报」字段（命中学科教育路由）。
prompts 必须包含「扁平 2D」「工业线框」「螺丝铆钉」「锚定三角支座」中至少 3 个。
prompts 必须包含「kicker」+「这样的」+「你喜欢吗？」+「桁架内力篇」（4 层文字结构齐全）。
prompts 不能包含「AI 节点」「纳斯达克」「K 线」「代码终端」「cyberpunk」「四层背景」等错误垂类元素。
title_strategy 不应该把 hook 类型选成 risk/reversal/result/pain（这些是 AI 工具 hook）；学科教育应优先 question / resonance / cognitive-gap / subject-fun。
生成的封面包含三张差异化变体（info-heavy / visual-heavy / balanced），尺寸 1080x1440。
封面里出现 4 段文字「这样的」「结构力学」「你喜欢吗？」「桁架内力篇」（VLM 抽样验证 OCR）。
如果「桁」字被错写成「析」「梁」等形近字，可以用 scripts/fix_rare_char.py 后处理修复——但 PIL 修字仅在原图确实有错字时使用，不要盲修。
skill 不应该在该 case 走 AI 工具默认模板：covers 视觉里不应出现 K 线、AI 节点网络、代码窗口、cyberpunk 发光等元素。
桁架结构是扁平 2D 工业线框（非 3D 立体渲染），两端有虚线锚定三角支座，红蓝箭头节制（每个结构 4-8 个）。
